name: Glitch
description: A dark signal tearing into bright slices — blocks crop themselves while cyan and magenta scanlines slip out of frame on every redraw.

code.style: --block: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color4)); --line1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --line2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color3)); --rule: ( @random(0.5) { background: var(--block); clip-path: inset(@rand(8%, 38%) @rand(0%, 24%) @rand(8%, 38%) @rand(0%, 24%)); opacity: @rand(0.5, 1); } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(-12%, 12%); width: @rand(60%, 104%); top: @rand(8%, 44%); height: @rand(5%, 12%); background: var(--line1); transition: ease 400ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(-8%, 16%); width: @rand(50%, 96%); top: @rand(56%, 88%); height: @rand(4%, 10%); background: var(--line2); transition: ease 400ms; } } transition: ease 400ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
